help: Optional. An agent id or its /128 address. Leave blank to reuse your most recently used agent (or allocate one).
name: agent
label: Agent (id or /128)

help: OFF (default): the bearer-embedding fields (http_proxy, connection_string) are stripped from the output. ON: they are included — they will be visible in this scenario's execution history to anyone who can open it. Prefer running the egress proxy where you control the network.
name: include_credentials
label: Include proxy credentials
